analysis.reasoning: The tweet emphasizes EU-led global action on human rights (eradicating forced labour), climate action under the Paris Agreement, and rule-based multilateralism in engaging with China. This aligns with EU5 (global champion of fair causes) for human rights, EU4 (avant-garde political actor) for leadership in regulation and tackling climate/multilateralism, and EU6 (contributes to a better world) for global cooperation and development-oriented aims.
